title: Run read-only queries on Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries from SQL editor
body: You can now connect to Lakebase (Provisioned) readable secondaries and run read-only queries from the Databricks SQL editor. See [Execute read-only queries from Databricks SQL Editor](/aws/en/oltp/instances/create/high-availability#sql-editor) and [Connect and query a database instance](/aws/en/oltp/instances/query/connect).

ref_links.text: Execute read-only queries from Databricks SQL Editor
Connect and query a database instance
